value.stringValue:
Thank you.

Your application has been submitted.

Lydiam Group. All rights reserved.
Lydiam Group, 17 Hannover Square, London, W1S 1BN

This email is intended for the named recipient only. It may contain privileged and confidential information. If you are not the intended recipient, notify the sender immediately and destroy this email. You must not copy, distribute or take action in reliance upon it.

Whilst all efforts are made to safeguard emails, we cannot guarantee that attachments are virus free or compatible with your systems and does not accept liability in respect of viruses or computer problems experienced. We reserve the right to monitor all email communications through its internal and external networks.

Dear Team,


Please find below the details of the newly created Salesforce records:


{!NameField.firstName} {!NameField.lastName}


Opportunity


Bank Account

recordCreates.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_Create_Link_Event
recordCreates.label: Copy 1 of Copy 2 of Create Link Event

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter both First Name and Last Name.
Please enter correct date of birth

fields.name: Is_the_Applicant_a_politically_exposed_person_PEP
fields.fieldText: Is the Applicant a politically exposed person (PEP)?

fields.name: Upload_Proof_of_ID_Display_Text
fields.fieldText: Upload Proof of ID (Accepted Format: JPG, JPEG, PNG | Max size: 25 MB )

value.stringValue: Upload a Copy of the ID
Accepted: JPG, JPEG, PNG | Max size: 25 MB

fields.name: DocRequired
fields.fieldText: * Identification Document is Required

fields.name: POA
fields.fieldText: Upload Proof of Address (Accepted Format: JPG, JPEG, PNG, PDF | Max size: 25 MB )

value.stringValue: Accepted: JPG, JPEG, PNG, PDF | Max size: 25 MB

fields.name: Valid_Prroof_of_Address
fields.fieldText:
✅ Accepted documents (in applicant's name):


- Bank statement

- Utility bill (gas, electric, water, cable, or landline phone)


❌ Not accepted:


- Credit card bills

- Mobile phone bills

- Insurance documents

- Driver's license

fields.name: POFText
fields.fieldText: *Proof of Address is Required

fields.name: Which_of_the_following_have_you_traded_in_the_past_12_months
fields.fieldText: Which of the following have you traded in the past 12 months

fields.name: Email_Address_for_Records_and_Notifications
fields.fieldText: Email Address for Records and Notifications

fields.name: Does_the_Applicant_have_an_investment_portfolio_Cash_and_Financial_Instruments_i
fields.fieldText: Does the Applicant have an investment portfolio (Cash and Financial Instruments) in excess of $500,000 or equivalents?

fields.name: Source_of_Wealth
fields.helpText: (Examples include employment income, investments, business ownership interests, inheritance. Please be as specific as possible to avoid delays in processing your application.):

fields.name: Source_of_Funds2
fields.helpText: (Examples include personal savings, pension releases, share sales and dividends, property sales, gambling winnings, inheritance. Please be as specific as possible to avoid delays in processing your application.)

fields.name: Countries_which_funds_transfers_are_expected_to_go_to
fields.fieldText: Countries which funds transfers are expected to go to

fields.name: Countries_which_funds_transfers_are_expected_to_come_from
fields.fieldText: Countries which funds transfers are expected to come from

fields.name: DT2
fields.fieldText:
By signing and returning this form, I/we confirm for and on behalf of the applicant that:


  • I have read, understood and accurately completed the application form to open a trading account.
  • I have received, read and understand the Lydiam Group Ltd Professional Electronic Trading Agreement and all other agreements herein.
  • I have read and understand the nature and risks of the products intended to trade through this account.


As the applicant, I have authorization to act on all matters regarding opening and operating the trading account with Lydiam Group including but not limited to deposits, withdrawals, trading and investment instruments.

fields.name: Terms
fields.fieldText:
TERMS OF BUSINESS


Please follow this link to view our Terms of Business: Click here

ELECTRONIC SIGNATURE AND ADOPTION

fields.name: Agreement
fields.fieldText: By accepting this Agreement, you consent and agree that your use of a key pad, mouse or other device to select an item, button, icon or similar act or action while using any electronic service we offer or in accessing or making any transactions regarding any documents and disclosures constitutes your signature as if actually signed by you in writing (electronic signature). In some cases your electronic signature may be represented by your type written name or initials electronically placed on the documents and disclosures by means of the process described herein. Your electronic signature, whether expressed by process or symbolically or both, is hereby adopted by you and represents your intent to acknowledge receipt or sign, as applicable, the documents and disclosures and that your electronic signatures are thereby attached to, and logically associated with, the documents and disclosures. Further, you agree that no certification authority or other third party verification is necessary to the validity of your electronic signature and that the lack of such certification or third party verification will not in any way affect the enforceability of your signature or any resulting contract between you or your company and Lydiam Group Ltd.

fields.name: Supporting
fields.fieldText:
Supporting Documentation Uploading

  • All corporate formation documents
  • Corporate formation documents and clear ownership structure for any corporate/entity shareholders
  • Most recent bank statement in the name of the company (no screenshots - actual statement required, or only if it's a new account, a welcome letter from the bank showing the account name and number)
  • Register of Shareholders and Directors
  • Individual verification of Directors (copy of passport and a bank statement or a utility bill less than 90 days old - gas, electric, water, cable, landline phone. We cannot accept credit cards, cellular bills, insurance, or a driver's license.)
  • Individual verification of Shareholders/Beneficial Owners with a 25% or greater interest in the Company (copy of passport and a bank statement or a utility bill - gas, electric, water, cable, landline phone. We cannot accept credit cards, cellular bills, insurance, or a driver's license.)
  • If the entity handles client funds of any type, an up to date AML/KYC policy.
  • Company Structure Chart (A company structure chart is a visualization of the ownership, governance, and management relationships among legal entities of a single enterprise - a collection of companies)

fields.name: Signatures
fields.fieldText:
Signatures

By electronically signing this form, you represent that all the information contained herein is true and accurate. You agree to be bound by the agreement as the applicant and confirm that you are not a third party applying on behalf of the applicant. Documentation verifying your identity and authority may be requested.

 

Trading FX, Digital Assets, CFDs, and other Financial Market Products and Instruments can result in losses exceeding your deposit. Use of these Products and Instruments may not be suitable for everyone. Please ensure you fully understand the risks and seek independent advice if necessary.

fields.name: TsandCs
fields.fieldText: Ts&Cs are required *

fields.name: I_agree_to_Terms_Conditions_above_declaratio
fields.fieldText: I agree to Terms & Conditions & above declaration

fields.name: ThankYouText
fields.fieldText:
Thank you.

Your application has been submitted.

textTemplates.name: cryptoformsubmittedsampleemail
textTemplates.text:
<p>Dear Team,</p>

<p>Please find below the details of the newly created Salesforce private crypto records:</p>


<p><strong>Account:</strong><br>

<a href="https://ability-customization-4283.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/{!AccountRecId}/view">View Account</a></p>


<p><strong>Opportunity:</strong><br>

<a href="https://ability-customization-4283.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/{!OpportunityId}/view">View Opportunity</a></p>


<p><strong>Bank Account:</strong><br>

<a href="https://ability-customization-4283.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Bank_Account__c/{!bankAccountId}/view">View Bank Account</a></p>


<p>🔴 <strong>Action Required:</strong> Please review the records and proceed with the next steps as needed.</p>


<p>Best regards,<br>Your Automation Team</p>
